description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular keyboard with a minimalist design, featuring three rows of keys arranged in a staggered, grid-like pattern. The keys are slightly raised and have a smooth, matte black finish, with no visible key labels or legends on their surfaces. The keyboard's body is low-profile and appears to be constructed from a single piece of material, giving it a seamless and modern appearance. There are no visible cables, ports, or branding elements on any side, emphasizing its clean aesthetic. The overall form is symmetrical, with the keys occupying most of the surface area and leaving only narrow borders around the edges. Its compact size and lack of additional features suggest it is designed for portability or specialized use in urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black keyboard with three rows of unmarked, raised keys and a seamless, minimalist design. The body is low-profile and free of visible branding or cables.
description_view_0: Front view showing three staggered rows of smooth, unmarked keys with a narrow border around the edges.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full grid of keys and the keyboard's rectangular, symmetrical layout.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same three rows of keys and clean, border edges.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view displaying the underside of the keys and the overall flat, rectangular base.
